smscollectr 0.0.2
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Parse a vector of SMS messages (all formats)

Source: R/sms.R
parse_sms.Rd

Detects the format of each SMS message, dispatches to the appropriate parser, and returns a named list of two tibbles — one per format.

Usage

parse_sms(texts)

Arguments

texts

character vector of raw SMS strings.

Value

A named list with two tibble::tibble() elements:

gauge

Parsed rain gauge observations with columns eg_gh_id, year, month, day, time, eg_el_abbreviation, value, flag.

agro

Parsed agrometeorological observations with the same columns.

Each tibble is empty (but correctly typed) if no valid messages of that format are found.

Details

Supported formats:

gauge

Format A — Rain gauge: "200001S, 03-06-2026, 125".

agro

Format B — Agrometeorological: multi-line [STATION]\n[DD]\nKey= val.

Invalid or unrecognised messages are silently dropped. Duplicates (same eg_gh_id, year, month, day, eg_el_abbreviation) keep the last occurrence within each tibble.

See also

read_sms()

On this page
